Class Mon

java.lang.Object
model.Mon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Altaria, Bibarel, Breloom, Bulbasaur, Feraligatr, Flygon, Lapras, Luxray, Raichu, Rampardos, Snorlax, Swampert, Toxicroak, Typhlosion, Venusaur, Weavile
public abstract class Mon extends Object implements Serializable
Abstract class that all mons should inherit from. Defines the basic parameters of what makes up a mon. Mons have 4 moves, a type (can be changed later when relevant) and HP. Move usage saved by the Move object itself.
Author:
Isa Abdulrazaq
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • getAtt

      public int getAtt()
      Return's the Mon's attack
      Returns:
      attack

    • getSAtt

      public int getSAtt()
      Return's the Mon's specialAttack
      Returns:
      specialAttack

    • getSDef

      public int getSDef()
      Return's the Mon's specialDefence
      Returns:
      specialDefence

    • getDef

      public int getDef()
      Return's the Mon's defence
      Returns:
      defence

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Return's the Mon's name
      Returns:
      name

    • getMaxHp

      public int getMaxHp()
      Return's the Mon's max health
      Returns:
      maxHp the maximum health the Mon can have

    • getCurrHp

      public int getCurrHp()
      Returns the Mon's current health
      Returns:
      currHp the Mon's current health

    • getMove

      public Move getMove(int index)
      Returns a reference to the Move object at the provided index of the moves array.
      Parameters:
      index - 0-3 for which of the Mon's moves are to be returned
      Returns:
      Move at the given index

    • getAllMoves

      public Move[] getAllMoves()
      Returns a reference to the entire move array. Useful for views to display all of the Mon's moves
      Returns:
      moves

    • getType

      public Move.Type getType()
      Returns the Mon's type. Not relevant until type advantages are implemented
      Returns:
      type

    • takeDamage

      public void takeDamage(int damage, Mon attacker, Move.Category category)
      Reduces the Mon's currHp by a given amount. To be called by Move.applyEffect(Mon, Mon).
      Parameters:
      damage - how much health the Mon should lose

    • hasFainted

      public boolean hasFainted()
      Determines whether the Mon has been defeated or if they can continue battling.
      Returns:
      true/false depending on whether their health has reached 0 or not.

    • heal

      public void heal(int healing)
      Heals pokemon by int healing amount
      Parameters:
      int - healing

    • getPlayerSprite

      public String getPlayerSprite()
      Returns a String of the player view sprite for the current Mon. Sprites pulled from: https://pokemondb.net/sprites/bulbasaur, you can search XXXX sprites (where XXXX is the name of the pokemon) to find them. Lapras and Bulbasaur use Gen 4 sprites.
      Returns:
      String of the file path to sprite.

    • getOppSprite

      public String getOppSprite()
      Returns a String of the opponent view sprite for the current Mon. Sprites pulled from: https://pokemondb.net/sprites/bulbasaur
      Returns:
      String of the file path to sprite.
